mapper.select: SELECT * FROM api_tokens WHERE token = #{token} AND is_revoked = false AND expires_at > NOW()
SELECT * FROM api_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_revoked = false AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM api_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND token_type = #{tokenType} AND is_revoked = false AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM api_tokens WHERE expires_at < NOW() OR is_revoked = true
